def: Of or pertaining to the polariscope; obtained by the use of apolariscope; as, polariscopic observations.
In an especial manner; chiefly; particularly; peculiarly; in anuncommon degree.
The act or process of torrefying, or the state of beingtorrefied. Bp. Hall.
The quality or state of being unsettled.
The state of healty tension or partial contraction of musclefibers while at rest; tone; tonus.
A small piece of artillery. Wilhelm.On the bastions were planted culverins and sakers. Macaulay.The culverins and sakers showing their deadly muzzles over therampart. Hawthorne.
Noting two small bones, forming the body of the inverted hyoidarch.
See Knop. Knob latch, a latch which can be operated by turninga knob, without using a key.
The state of being a cenobite; the belief or practice of acenobite. Milman.
